topic.name: 军事、安全与突发事件
topic.description: 追踪冲突、军备、公共安全和仍在发展的重大事件

overview: 今日专题“军事、安全与突发事件”。共筛选 23 个高价值事件，重点关注中国相关进展、美国相关进展及全球外交、经济与安全动态。

items.title: Hamas names new leader as Kuwait says it is under fire from Iran – Middle East crisis live
items.summary: Palestinian militant ⁠group names Khalil al-Hayya as new overall leader as Kuwait army says it is confronting missile and drone attacks from Tehran US expands Iran offensive as diplomats claim talks ongoing The price of oil jumped in early Asian trade on Monday after the US carried out its latest wave of strikes on Iran and a vessel caught fire in the strait of Hormuz. Brent crude for September delivery rose 2.72% to $90.50 a barrel by around 0100 GMT, after briefly crossing $91 – its highest price since June. CENTCOM assets targeted Iranian military command centers, air defense and coastal surveillance sites, maritime capabilities, missile and drone launch sites, and communications networks to further diminish Iran’s ability to attack commercial vessels and civilian mariners transiting the Strait of Hormuz. The U.S. military is holding Iran accountable at the Commander in Chief’s direction. Continue reading...
tags: 专题·军事、安全与突发事件
items.titleZh: 哈马斯任命新领导人，科威特称遭到伊朗袭击——中东危机直播
items.summaryZh: 哈马斯任命哈利勒·哈亚为新领导人，同时科威特军方报告称正遭受来自伊朗的导弹和无人机袭击。受中东局势恶化影响，国际油价出现上涨。
items.whyImportant: 中东冲突范围的扩大和油价波动对全球经济稳定构成了直接威胁。

items.title: Maine Democrats rally around Troy Jackson to replace Graham Platner in crucial Senate race – US politics live
items.summary: Former state legislator in strong position to become Democratic nominee after several candidates drop out over the weekend Sign up for the Breaking News US email While speaking to reporters on Sunday, Donald Trump acknowledged the three US military casualties as the strikes on Iran continue unabated. “Well, we feel very badly, but you know those great people, those great patriots, were out there fighting that Iran cannot have a nuclear weapon,” Trump said while returning to Washington from the Fifa World Cup final in New Jersey. Continue reading...
tags: 专题·军事、安全与突发事件
items.titleZh: 缅因州民主党人团结在特洛伊·杰克逊周围，以取代格雷厄姆·普拉特纳参加关键参议院竞选
items.summaryZh: 在多名候选人退出竞选后，前州议员特洛伊·杰克逊成为民主党提名的有力竞争者。同时，特朗普在返回华盛顿途中对阵亡美军士兵表示了哀悼。
items.whyImportant: 此次竞选变动可能影响美国参议院的权力平衡，并受到国内政治局势的影响。

items.title: Iran’s president says country is in ‘full-scale war’ after expansion of US attacks
items.summary: Masoud Pezeshkian warns Iran may have to endure more strikes, as diplomats say de-escalation talks are ongoing Middle East crisis live – latest updates Iran’s president has said the country is in a “full-scale war” after the US expanded its aerial campaign and Tehran struck Washington’s Gulf allies, even as diplomats say talks are ongoing to de-escalate. Iranian media reported strikes around Tabriz, believed to hold underground missile bases, as well as Bushehr, home to the country’s only operational civilian nuclear power plant. The US military said it had struck “military command centers, air defence and coastal surveillance sites, maritime capabilities, missile and drone launch sites and communications networks”. Continue reading...
tags: 专题·军事、安全与突发事件
items.titleZh: 伊朗总统称在美军袭击扩大后，国家处于“全面战争”状态
items.summaryZh: 伊朗总统佩泽希齐扬警告称，随着美国扩大空中打击范围，伊朗可能面临更多袭击。尽管外交渠道仍在进行降温谈判，但伊朗境内多处军事设施遭到打击。
items.whyImportant: 美伊冲突升级至“全面战争”的表态，标志着地区局势进入了极度危险的阶段。

items.title: First Thing: US continues attacks on Iran ‘in honor’ of dead service members | Martin Belam
items.summary: US launches ninth night of strikes against Iran. Plus, Trump at the World Cup and the glorious art deco LA Central Library celebrates 100 years Don’t already get First Thing in your inbox? Sign up here Good morning. The US launched a ninth night of strikes targeting Iran early Monday, after announcing the death of another American service member – the third in recent days. Donald Trump said the new attacks were “in honor” of the US dead. The Iranian supreme leader, Mojtaba Khamenei, warned of “unforgettable lessons” if the US kept attacking. Trump has threatened to target Iran’s power stations and bridges to try to compel Tehran to loosen its hold on the strait of Hormuz. Last week the US reimposed a naval blockade on Iranian ports. On Saturday, the military said it had redirected six ships and disabled one since then. Oil prices rose at the opening of trading in Asia on Monday, with the price of Brent crude climbing 2.72% to $90.50 a barrel. Where have US service personnel been killed? The service member was killed on Saturday in northern Iraq during a controlled detonation of what was called unexploded ordnance on a downed Iranian attack drone. It was the third US death in recent
tags: 专题·军事、安全与突发事件
items.titleZh: 头条：美国继续袭击伊朗以“纪念”阵亡军人
items.summaryZh: 美国对伊朗发动了连续第九晚的空袭，以回应美军士兵的死亡。特朗普威胁将打击伊朗的电力设施和桥梁，以迫使伊朗放松对霍尔木兹海峡的控制。
items.whyImportant: 美军的持续报复行动使美伊直接冲突的风险达到了新的高度。

items.title: Russian attack on Odesa kills three after Ukraine targets Moscow with drones overnight – as it happened
items.summary: Moscow targets southern city after the Russian capital was hit by 400 drones in response to one of the war’s biggest attacks on Kyiv at the weekend There is also a bit more from Reuters on the context – and the significance – of these continued strikes on ships: “Both Russia and Ukraine are major grain exporters, and ​the renewed violence on this route has ​raised concerns about supply. Ukraine, which in recent ​seasons accounted for about 6% of global wheat exports and about 11% of global corn ​exports, has lost about a ‌third of its capacity ​to export grain via ​its Black Sea ports due to Russian missile and drone attacks, traders and analysts have said. “Upon prime minister @KoretskyiUA’s instructions, @MFA_Ukraine is already informing the International Maritime Organization and our international partners about Russia’s latest attacks on civilian shipping, as well as the governments of the states whose citizens were killed or injured. During president @ZelenskyyUa‘s recent visit to London, I discussed this issue with the IMO leadership and called for the deployment of an international monitoring mission to Ukraine’s ports. We expect this mission to begin its work as planned in
tags: 专题·军事、安全与突发事件
items.titleZh: 俄罗斯袭击敖德萨致三人死亡，此前乌克兰连夜用无人机袭击莫斯科
items.summaryZh: 在乌克兰对莫斯科发动大规模无人机袭击后，俄罗斯对敖德萨进行了报复性打击。乌克兰官员呼吁国际海事组织部署监测团，以应对俄罗斯对民用航运的持续攻击及其对全球粮食供应的影响。
items.whyImportant: 俄乌冲突升级至针对民用港口和航运的直接对抗，加剧了全球粮食安全担忧。

items.title: Hamas’ lead negotiator in ceasefire talks elected as group’s new chief
items.summary: Palestinian Islamist movement Hamas announced on Monday that it had elected Khalil al-Hayya, the group’s lead negotiator in indirect ceasefire talks with Israel, as the new head of its political bureau. “The Islamic Resistance Movement (Hamas) announces the election of brother mujahid Khalil al-Hayya as head of the movement’s political bureau, succeeding the martyred leader Yahya al-Sinwar,” Hamas said in a statement. Sinwar, whom Israel accused of being one of the principal architects of the...
tags: 专题·军事、安全与突发事件
items.titleZh: 哈马斯停火谈判首席代表当选为该组织新领导人
items.summaryZh: 巴勒斯坦伊斯兰抵抗运动（哈马斯）宣布选举哈利勒·哈亚为政治局新任领导人，接替此前被杀的叶海亚·辛瓦尔。哈亚此前一直担任哈马斯与以色列间接停火谈判的首席代表。
items.whyImportant: 哈马斯领导层的更迭可能对中东地区的停火谈判进程产生关键影响。

items.title: Can Europe win a trade war with China? It may depend on how victory is defined
items.summary: As trade tensions with China reach boiling point, EU officials are ramping up engagement with Beijing in search of an off-ramp. Quietly behind the scenes, though, Europe is preparing for a trade war. In Brussels, a steely determination has set in to ensure the bloc’s manufacturing heartlands are not deindustrialised by the “China Shock 2.0”. With some industries already haemorrhaging jobs, the EU’s resilience-building and de-risking plans are now laced with deterrents as Brussels looks to...
tags: 专题·军事、安全与突发事件
items.titleZh: 欧洲能赢得与中国的贸易战吗？这可能取决于如何定义胜利
items.summaryZh: 面对贸易紧张局势，欧盟在寻求与北京对话的同时，也在幕后为贸易战做准备。布鲁塞尔决心防止欧洲制造业因“中国冲击2.0”而陷入去工业化。
items.whyImportant: 欧盟对华贸易政策的转向反映了其在经济安全与全球贸易合作之间的艰难平衡。

items.title: Australian ski resorts smash July climate records with temperatures 12C above average
items.summary: Resorts in NSW and Victoria face a warm and dry start to the season with only sporadic falls of natural snow in many alpine areas Get our breaking news email, free app or daily news podcast Alpine ski resorts in New South Wales and Victoria saw climate records shattered at the weekend with maximum temperatures up to 12C above average. Ski areas of Mount Hotham and Falls Creek set July records for their hottest daytime and night-time temperatures and Thredbo also set a new hottest July day, according to the Bureau of Meteorology. Continue reading...
tags: 专题·军事、安全与突发事件
items.titleZh: 澳大利亚滑雪胜地气温比平均水平高出12摄氏度，打破七月气候记录
items.summaryZh: 新南威尔士州和维多利亚州的滑雪胜地经历了异常温暖干燥的季节开端，气温比七月平均水平高出12摄氏度。多个滑雪场打破了有记录以来的最高日间和夜间气温纪录。
items.whyImportant: 极端高温天气对澳大利亚冬季旅游业及当地气候环境造成了显著负面影响。

items.title: Hamas names Khalil al-Hayya as new overall leader
items.summary: The Palestinian armed group's Qatar-based chief negotiator replaces Yahya Sinwar, who was killed by Israeli forces in Gaza in 2024.
tags: 专题·军事、安全与突发事件
items.titleZh: 哈马斯任命哈利勒·哈亚为新任总领导人
items.summaryZh: 哈马斯任命常驻卡塔尔的首席谈判代表哈利勒·哈亚接替叶海亚·辛瓦尔，后者于2024年在加沙被以色列军队击毙。哈亚将负责领导该组织在战时状态下的政治事务。
items.whyImportant: 此举标志着哈马斯在战时领导层重组中选择了具有外交谈判经验的人物。

items.title: GB News will not be investigated over ‘no riot in Belfast’ claim
items.summary: Media regulator to take no action despite receiving 446 complaints about comments by Bev Turner GB News will not be investigated by the media regulator after a presenter insisted there was no riot in Belfast last month, despite cars and houses being set alight, attacks on police and families fleeing their homes. Ofcom received more than 400 complaints following the comments by Bev Turner, presenter of the broadcaster’s Late Show Live, who said there “weren’t riots” and that no houses had been burnt in the violent disorder. Continue reading...
tags: 专题·军事、安全与突发事件
items.titleZh: 英国GB新闻台因“贝尔法斯特无骚乱”言论将不会受到调查
items.summaryZh: 尽管英国媒体监管机构Ofcom收到了446起投诉，但决定不对GB新闻台主持人贝夫·特纳的言论展开调查。特纳此前坚称贝尔法斯特没有发生骚乱，尽管当时该地确实发生了暴力事件。
items.whyImportant: 此决定引发了关于媒体监管机构在处理虚假信息和新闻责任方面效力的讨论。

items.title: Manufacturing union says Australia’s tax system is ‘rigged’ in bold manifesto ahead of Labor conference
items.summary: AMWU calls for wealth and inheritance taxes, free education and more revenue from gas companies as it outlines ‘working-class agenda’ Get our breaking news email, free app or daily news podcast A new tax rate for the highest income earners, introducing wealth and inheritance taxes and extracting more revenue from gas companies form part of a new leftwing manifesto circulating ahead of the Labor party’s national conference. The extra tax revenue could help raise the jobseeker rate, make education – including university – free, and nationalise aged care under what the Australian Manufacturing Workers’ Union (AMWU) calls a blueprint for a “working-class agenda”. Continue reading...
tags: 专题·军事、安全与突发事件
items.titleZh: 澳大利亚制造业工会发布大胆宣言，称税收制度被“操纵”
items.summaryZh: 澳大利亚制造业工会（AMWU）在工党全国会议前夕提出了一项左翼议程，呼吁征收财富税和遗产税，并增加对天然气公司的征税。该组织主张利用额外税收收入实现免费教育及养老护理国有化。
items.whyImportant: 工会的这一主张反映了澳大利亚劳工阶层对当前经济分配不均的强烈不满。

items.title: Ten killed as Russian attacks on merchant ships in Black Sea intensify
items.summary: Russian strikes on the Odesa region have killed 28 people in July alone, local authorities say.
tags: 专题·军事、安全与突发事件
items.titleZh: 俄罗斯加强对黑海商船的袭击，造成十人死亡
items.summaryZh: 据当地政府统计，仅7月份俄罗斯对敖德萨地区的袭击已造成28人死亡。近期针对商船的袭击频率显著增加，引发了国际社会对黑海航运安全的担忧。
items.whyImportant: 俄罗斯对黑海航运的持续打击进一步破坏了乌克兰的出口能力并威胁地区安全。

items.title: What are ‘civilian’ sites in international law and where have US, Iran hit?
items.summary: The US has escalated attacks on Iranian roads, bridges and power plants, and Iran too, has responded.
tags: 专题·军事、安全与突发事件
items.titleZh: 国际法中的“民用”场所定义是什么？美伊双方袭击了哪些目标？
items.summaryZh: 随着冲突升级，美国加大了对伊朗道路、桥梁和发电厂的打击力度，伊朗也对此进行了反击。文章探讨了国际法对民用设施的保护界限及当前冲突中的目标选择。
items.whyImportant: 美伊冲突中对基础设施的打击引发了关于战争法和人道主义准则的广泛争议。

items.title: What we know about US soldiers killed in Iran war, and Iranian casualties
items.summary: Trump has expressed sadness and vowed to hit Iran 'very hard' to honour killed US soldiers.
tags: 专题·军事、安全与突发事件
items.titleZh: 关于伊朗战争中阵亡的美国士兵及伊朗伤亡情况的已知信息
items.summaryZh: 唐纳德·特朗普对阵亡的美国士兵表示哀悼，并誓言要对伊朗采取强硬报复措施。目前双方在冲突中的具体伤亡数字仍是国际关注的焦点。
items.whyImportant: 美军人员的伤亡显著加剧了美国国内对伊朗采取军事行动的政治压力。

items.title: Who is Khalil al-Hayya, Hamas’s newly elected political chief?
items.summary: Veteran negotiator assumes Palestinian group's overall leadership following a wartime election process.
tags: 专题·军事、安全与突发事件
items.titleZh: 哈马斯新任政治领导人哈利勒·哈亚是谁？
items.summaryZh: 哈利勒·哈亚是一位资深的哈马斯谈判代表，在战时选举程序后接任该组织政治领导人。他长期参与巴勒斯坦内部事务及与外部的间接谈判。
items.whyImportant: 哈亚的背景和立场将直接影响哈马斯未来的政治走向及与国际社会的互动。

items.title: As EU’s China trade deficit widens, Germany changes tack to join France’s Beijing pushback
items.summary: Facing Europe’s ever-widening trade deficit with Beijing, Berlin is increasingly singing the same tune as Paris. The two nations displayed a united front at this year’s Franco-German Ministerial Council, which will soon be put on paper in a joint road map due by September at the request of Germany. “Our work between Germany and France is indispensable at a time when Russia threatens our security, when the People’s Republic of China challenges our economy, and when the transatlantic partnership...
tags: 专题·军事、安全与突发事件
items.titleZh: 随着欧盟对华贸易逆差扩大，德国改变立场加入法国对华强硬阵营
items.summaryZh: 面对对华贸易逆差的不断扩大，德国在对华政策上正逐渐与法国保持一致。两国计划在9月前制定联合路线图，以应对中国对欧洲经济的挑战。
items.whyImportant: 德法两国在对华政策上的协同，预示着欧盟整体对华贸易立场可能趋于强硬。

items.title: Taiwan reviews Papua New Guinea LNG imports after economic office’s forced closure
items.summary: Taiwan is reviewing liquefied natural gas (LNG) imports from Papua New Guinea after the Pacific nation said it would close Taipei’s unofficial representative office. PNG announced last week that it would immediately shut down the office, with Foreign Minister Justin Tkatchenko saying the move reflected the government’s “unwavering commitment to the one-China policy” ahead of the 50th anniversary of the country’s diplomatic ties with Beijing. Chinese foreign ministry spokesman Lin Jian swiftly...
items.titleZh: 台湾在驻巴布亚新几内亚代表处被迫关闭后审查LNG进口
items.summaryZh: 巴布亚新几内亚宣布关闭台湾的非官方代表处，以重申对“一个中国”政策的承诺。作为回应，台湾方面正在审查从该国进口液化天然气的相关事宜。
items.whyImportant: 此举显示了地缘政治因素对台湾能源供应和外交关系的直接影响。

items.title: China’s military mouthpiece issues full-page warning on Japan’s growing drone power
items.summary: China’s military mouthpiece on Monday dedicated a full page to warning about Japan’s expanding offensive drone capabilities, which it said threatened regional peace and security. PLA Daily said Japan’s right-wing political forces had long sought to bypass Tokyo’s constitutional ban, adopted after World War II, on offensive combat capabilities. Uncrewed platforms have allowed Japan to circumvent these constraints on military development, according to one of four PLA Daily articles on the topic in...
tags: 专题·军事、安全与突发事件
items.titleZh: 中国军方喉舌发布整版警告，关注日本日益增长的无人机力量
items.summaryZh: 《解放军报》刊文警告称，日本正在利用无人机技术绕过二战后宪法对进攻性作战能力的限制。文章认为日本此举威胁到了地区和平与安全。
items.whyImportant: 中国对日本军事发展的关注凸显了东亚地区日益紧张的军事竞争态势。

items.title: Malaysia upgrades South China Sea defences amid Sabah row with Philippines
items.summary: Malaysia is stepping up surveillance on its eastern flank, pushing ahead with plans for a long-range radar at a frontline South China Sea outpost and launching newly operational drones. The upgrades reflect Kuala Lumpur’s bid to improve its ability to detect threats as the Philippines revives its claim over Sabah state in Malaysian Borneo and Chinese patrols persist near its offshore energy fields. Defence Minister Mohamed Khaled Nordin said on Sunday that the radar would be installed on Swallow...
tags: 专题·军事、安全与突发事件
items.titleZh: 马来西亚升级南海防御，应对与菲律宾的沙巴争端
items.summaryZh: 马来西亚正在加强东部边境的监视能力，包括安装远程雷达和部署新型无人机。此举旨在应对菲律宾对沙巴州的主权主张以及中国在附近海域的巡逻活动。
items.whyImportant: 南海周边国家防御能力的升级加剧了该地区领土争端的复杂性。

items.title: Trump says US strikes hit Iran in 'honour' of American soldiers killed
items.summary: Iran responded with attacks in Syria and Jordan, as two ships reportedly exploded in the Strait of Hormuz.
tags: 专题·军事、安全与突发事件
items.titleZh: 特朗普称美国袭击伊朗是为了“纪念”阵亡的美国士兵
items.summaryZh: 作为对美国袭击的回应，伊朗在叙利亚和约旦发动了攻击，据报道霍尔木兹海峡有两艘船只发生爆炸。美伊双方的军事对抗正在持续升级。
items.whyImportant: 双方的军事报复行动正在导致中东地区安全局势的迅速恶化。

items.title: Israel criticises Labor’s draft Palestine policy in rare foreign intervention ahead of party conference
items.summary: Statement by Israeli embassy in Canberra challenges proposed positions on settler violence and annexation of Palestinian territory Get our breaking news email, free app or daily news podcast Israel has made an intervention into the Labor party’s internal processes, publicly criticising a draft policy platform that it claims risks blaming Israel for the Gaza conflict while giving “insufficient attention” to the role of Hamas. The Israeli embassy in Canberra issued a four-page statement on Monday challenging the proposed positions on Palestine, Hamas and settler violence in the West Bank, due to be debated at this week’s Labor national conference. Continue reading...
tags: 专题·军事、安全与突发事件
items.titleZh: 以色列批评澳大利亚工党的巴勒斯坦政策草案，在党代会前进行罕见的外交干预
items.summaryZh: 以色列驻堪培拉大使馆公开批评澳大利亚工党的一份政策草案，称其在加沙冲突中对以色列指责过多，而对哈马斯的责任关注不足。这是以色列罕见地干预澳大利亚国内政党进程。
items.whyImportant: 此举反映了以色列对国际社会在巴以问题上立场变化的极度敏感。

items.title: Russia says bus strike kills 5 in border region with Ukraine
items.summary: The strike comes as Ukraine launched more than hundreds of drones at Moscow after a Russian missile barrage on Kyiv, as President Zelenskyy sought to calm growing tensions over Ukraine’s military leadership.
tags: 专题·军事、安全与突发事件
items.titleZh: 俄罗斯称乌克兰边境地区发生巴士袭击，造成5人死亡
items.summaryZh: 在乌克兰对莫斯科发动大规模无人机袭击后，俄罗斯边境地区发生巴士袭击事件。与此同时，泽连斯基正试图平息国内关于军事领导层的紧张局势。
items.whyImportant: 俄乌边境冲突的加剧进一步模糊了前线与后方的界限，增加了平民伤亡风险。

items.title: At-home STI test pulled from Australian shelves after failing to detect infections
items.summary: Exclusive: TGA finds Touch Biotechnology test for chlamydia and gonorrhoea ‘is not reliable’ and has affected an unspecified number of people Get our breaking news email, free app or daily news podcast Australia’s only approved home test for chlamydia and gonorrhoea has been pulled from shelves after it failed to detect infections for an unspecified number of patients. Touch Biotechnology has been handed a six‑month suspension by the Therapeutic Goods Administration (TGA) after a review of the company’s self‑testing kit found “the device is not reliable … and poses a high risk for false negative results for users”. Continue reading...
tags: 专题·军事、安全与突发事件
items.titleZh: 澳大利亚家用性病检测试剂盒因无法检测出感染被下架
items.summaryZh: 澳大利亚唯一获批的衣原体和淋病家用检测试剂盒因检测结果不可靠被下架。监管机构发现该产品存在高风险的假阴性结果，并对生产商实施了六个月的停产处罚。
items.whyImportant: 医疗器械的质量问题直接影响公共卫生安全，引发了对家用检测产品监管的关注。
